title: ScriptArtifact
description:
Top-level script artifact.

Scripts are referenced from [`crate::world_manifest::WorldManifest::scripts`] by stable `id`. Runtime resolves the id to this artifact, verifies the signature, confirms the capability bundle matches the host policy, then instantiates the WASM module.

capabilities.description: Capability declaration — must fit within the host's policy.

source_inline_base64.description: Optional DSL source (inline base64) or a reference to a content-addressed blob holding the source.

wasm_inline_base64.description: Compiled WASM — same inline-vs-cid split as the source.

CapabilityDeclaration.description:
Explicit capability declaration. The runtime enforces that the script only calls host functions in this bundle.

This list is deliberately conservative and small; new capabilities should be added via the versioning/migration policy.

custom.description: Free-form custom capabilities — the runtime must recognize each string.

persistence_read.description: Access persistent storage (key/value on behalf of the world).

read_world.description: Read state from the world (queries, component reads).

write_world.description: Mutate world state (spawn entities, set components).

ScriptSignature.description: Ed25519-style signature record. The cryptographic verification is performed by `aether-security`; this schema layer merely ensures the record is structurally well-formed.

signature_base64.description: Base64-encoded signature over the canonical bytes of the WASM module.
